Rule 8. Verification of application and approval

(2)

(a) the proper officer shall verify the application.

(b) omitted

(c) omitted

(4A) The proper officer may act on the application [3].

Provided that the officer shall record reasons [2].

The reference in this sub-rule shall include the proviso to sub-rule (4A).

[2] Inserted vide Notification No. 31/2020-Central Tax, dated 03.04.2020.

[3] Substituted vide Notification No. 40/2021-Central Tax, dated 29.12.2021.
